title: Tencent Workbuddy: RIP Claude,Codex! This is ACTUALLY quite a bit CRAZY!
summary: Tencent WorkBuddy is a desktop AI productivity agent for office work including file reading, spreadsheet analysis, report generation, and presentation creation. It features 100+ domain expert agents, multi-agent expert teams, remote control via Slack/Telegram/Discord/WeChat, and skill marketplace extensions with pricing starting around $10/month.
writeup: The video covers Tencent WorkBuddy, a desktop AI productivity agent built for office tasks such as file reading, spreadsheet analysis, report generation, and presentation creation. It details the product's main features: more than 100 domain expert agents, multi-agent expert teams, remote control through Slack, Telegram, Discord, and WeChat, and a skill marketplace for extensions, with pricing starting around $10 per month. The focus is on how the tool applies multi-agent orchestration to everyday office workflows.
